base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of big_mario_walk — a character (playable) from 1985 super mario bros. 3-frame walk cycle, mirror of small variant at 2× height. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 3-frame walk cycle, mirror of small variant at 2× height; same counter-phase arm/leg swing
